title: Establishment Templates (pack level)
description: Genre-typed templates for unnamed establishments (taverns, shops, temples). When a player enters an establishment the world YAML hasn't pre-named, the generator picks a template, selects a tier from settlement wealth, and produces staff/menu/patrons. Named establishments live in existing world YAML and are NOT generated here. PRD §2.2. Lives at sidequest-content/genre_packs/<pack>/establishment_templates.yaml. Top-level keys are establishment categories (open enum: 'tavern', 'tea_room', 'fixer_bar', 'temple', 'general_store', 'apothecary', 'gunsmith', ...) — genre-typed.

tiers.description: Map of quality tier id (open enum: 'poor', 'common', 'fine', or genre-typed) to its shape. Settlement wealth selects a tier at generation time.

menu_items.description: Pool of items that may appear on the establishment's menu/inventory. The generator filters by tier.

menu_quality.description: Short prose description the narrator may surface verbatim (e.g. 'gruel and ale', 'roast and wine').

patron_count.description: [min, max] number of NPC patrons present. Generator samples uniformly.

rumors.description: Number of rumors the establishment surfaces in a scene. Rumors source from active tropes (not random flavor).

tier.description: Tier id this item is available at. Must match a key in `tiers`.

price_range.description: Optional [min, max] price. The economy schema's currency applies.

common.menu_quality: proper pot and a scone with cream
